post_review_fixes_applied: Tightened fixed_pfa_flag to a 25%/1e-4 absolute tolerance and reran D5H-Exec.
Range-only PFA=1e-3 is now marked warn rather than yes.
Stricter-PFA diagnostic dictionaries are blank for non-RD/non-executable rows.
Phase 0 weak-threshold evidence is parsed from d5d_rd_weak_thresholds.json and rerun.

no_training_boundary.details: D5H script reads local files/prior tables only; config blocks training, D6, false alarm penalty, detector changes, fixed-PFA protocol modification, and new data downloads.

gt_proxy_provenance.details: Objectness/class and projected range/azimuth are separated from absent true Doppler, velocity, RAD boxes, and temporal tracks.

fixed_pfa_consistency.details: Reviewer found initially loose fixed-PFA feasibility flags; local patch tightened flags and reran, but no second external review was requested.

result_existence.details: Required D5H CSV/MD/JSON outputs and analyze-results outputs exist and agree on no pass.

dead_code_metric_mismatch.details: Reviewer found hard-coded Phase 0 weak-threshold text; local patch now parses D5D threshold JSON and reran.

scope_claim_inflation.details: Outputs do not inflate RD/RA/RAD proxy evidence into confirmed performance and keep D6/minimal sanity blocked.

eligibility_label_conservatism: conservative; no-pass is supported; proxy-only rows must be treated as ineligible for confirmed Gao77 performance
action_items: Keep proxy-only rows barred from D6 and minimal model sanity.
Treat fixed-PFA feasibility for range-only PFA=1e-3 as warning/qualified evidence.
Use a label/protocol pivot before any training route.

claim_impact.claim: D5H-Exec was no-training and boundary compliant
Any representation is eligible for minimal model sanity
Current route should continue weak weighting or enter D6
